docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $452.00 FILED BY BROWN, TANYA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, REGINALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, TANYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN, REGINALD $534.48 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $580.48, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO AMEND CLAIM TO $534.48 IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, REGINALD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, REGINALD
